'''Slaag Lado''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Draag]] wanted by the [[Mon Calamari Civil Authority]] for creating a [[seismic shock pulse]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], this created a rift in the [[Salinrerian Sea]], causing large amounts of environmental damage and perpetual rain. Slaag Lado's bounty was 3,000 credits alive and its 1,500 dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
